---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
#setwd(C:/Users/your/folder")

library(readxl)
df <- read_excel("computer_broadband.xlsx")
names(df) <- round(as.numeric(names(df)), 2)
```

```{r}
head(df)
```

```{r}
# Row 1 = total households
total_row <- as.numeric(unlist(df[1, -1]))

# Row 2 = households with computer
computer_row <- as.numeric(unlist(df[2, -1]))

# Remove any NA columns
valid <- !is.na(total_row) & !is.na(computer_row)

total_row <- total_row[valid]
computer_row <- computer_row[valid]

# Build contingency table
contingency_table <- rbind(
  With_Computer = computer_row,
  Without_Computer = total_row - computer_row
)

contingency_table

# Run chi-square test
chisq.test(contingency_table)
```
```{r}
tract <- factor(seq_along(computer_row))

glm_model <- glm(
  cbind(computer_row, total_row - computer_row) ~ tract,
  family = binomial

)

library(emmeans)

pairs(emmeans(glm_model, "tract"), adjust = "holm")
```


## NEW ATTEMPT WITH LOGISITIC REGRESSION

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

df <- read_excel("computer_broadband.xlsx", col_names = TRUE)

df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -`Label (Grouping)`,
    names_to = "Tract",
    values_to = "Count"
  )

df_clean <- df_long %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = `Label (Grouping)`,
    values_from = Count
  )

df_clean <- df_clean %>%
  mutate(
    Tract = as.factor(round(as.numeric(Tract), 2)),
    Total_households = as.numeric(Total_households),
    With_a_computer = as.numeric(With_a_computer)
  )

head(df_clean)

model <- glm(
  cbind(With_a_computer,
        Total_households - With_a_computer) ~ Tract,
  family = binomial,
  data = df_clean
)
```


```{r}
model <- glm(
  cbind(With_a_computer,
        Total_households - With_a_computer) ~ Tract,
  family = binomial,
  data = df_clean
)

anova(model, test = "Chisq")
summary(model)
```
```{r}
library(emmeans)

emm <- emmeans(model, ~ Tract, type = "response")

pairs(emm, adjust = "bonferroni")
```


## CITY OF GVILLE CENSUS TRACTS ONLY

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(emmeans)

df <- read_excel("computer_broadband.xlsx", col_names = TRUE)

df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -`Label (Grouping)`,
    names_to = "Tract",
    values_to = "Count"
  )

df_clean <- df_long %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = `Label (Grouping)`,
    values_from = Count
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Tract = round(as.numeric(Tract), 2),
    Total_households = as.numeric(Total_households),
    With_a_computer = as.numeric(With_a_computer)
  )

selected_tracts <- c(
  10, 11, 1108, 12.01, 12.02, 12.03, 14,
  15.14, 15.15, 15.16, 15.17, 15.19, 15.22,
  16.05, 17.01, 17.02,
  18.02, 18.03, 18.11, 18.13, 18.15, 18.16,
  18.17, 18.18, 18.19,
  19.02, 19.07, 19.08,
  2.01, 2.02,
  20.01, 20.02,
  21.01, 21.02,
  22.01, 22.02, 22.04, 22.07, 22.08, 22.09,
  22.10, 22.17, 22.18, 22.19, 22.20, 22.21, 22.22,
  3.01, 3.02, 4, 5, 6, 7,
  8.06, 8.08, 8.09,
  9.01, 9.02
)

df_subset <- df_clean %>%
  filter(Tract %in% selected_tracts) %>%
  mutate(Tract = as.factor(Tract))

model_subset <- glm(
  cbind(With_a_computer,
        Total_households - With_a_computer) ~ Tract,
  family = binomial,
  data = df_subset
)

anova(model_subset, test = "Chisq")

emm <- emmeans(model_subset, ~ Tract, type = "response")

pairs(emm, adjust = "bonferroni")   
```


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(emmeans)

df <- read_excel("computer_broadband.xlsx", col_names = TRUE)

df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -`Label (Grouping)`,
    names_to = "Tract",
    values_to = "Count"
  )

df_clean <- df_long %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = `Label (Grouping)`,
    values_from = Count
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Tract = round(as.numeric(Tract), 2),
    Total_households = as.numeric(Total_households),
    With_a_computer = as.numeric(With_a_computer)
  )

selected_tracts <- c(2.01, 2.02, 3.01, 3.02, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8.08, 8.09, 9.01, 9.02, 10, 11, 12.02, 12.01, 12.03, 15.14, 15.15, 15.16, 15.17, 15.19, 15.22, 16.05, 17.02, 17.01, 18.11, 18.03, 18.13, 19.02, 14, 22.17, 22.18, 22.19, 22.20, 19.08, 18.02, 18.16
)

df_subset <- df_clean %>%
  filter(Tract %in% selected_tracts) %>%
  mutate(Tract = as.factor(Tract))

model_subset <- glm(
  cbind(With_a_computer,
        Total_households - With_a_computer) ~ Tract,
  family = binomial,
  data = df_subset
)

anova(model_subset, test = "Chisq")

emm <- emmeans(model_subset, ~ Tract, type = "response")

pairs(emm, adjust = "bonferroni")   
```
```
